name: Hershey's Best Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hershey's Cocoa or Hershey's European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter by microwaving it at HIGH (100%) for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes. Stir in sugar and vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well with a spoon after each addition.
5. Mix in cocoa powder; beat until well blended.
6. Incorporate flour, baking powder, and salt; beat until combined.
7. Fold in chopped nuts if desired.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the brownies pull away from the sides of the pan.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely on a wire rack.
11. Frost with Creamy Brownie Frosting and cut into bars.
YIELD: about 36 brownies
